misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, a familiar face at Kurk Golf, brings a unique dimension to the greens. Beyond his consistent participation, what sets Marcus apart is his intriguing duality. Known for his composed demeanor on the course, Marcus harbors a secret: an alter ego named Eva.

While Marcus has yet to clinch the coveted Hector Trophée or secure an individual Victor trophy, his dedication to the sport remains unwavering. He has participated in every single iteration of the Hector Trophée, showing his commitment to the event.

Those close to Marcus know of his occasional ventures into tournaments as Eva, a testament to his exploration of gender identity and a celebration of his multifaceted personality. Whether competing as Marcus or embracing his alter ego Eva, his presence enriches the spirit of the game, adding a layer of intrigue and acceptance to the fairways.
